svg.text: each box = one .sv module with its real ports; arrows = RTL signals; green=PC/branch purple=forwarding orange=hazard navy=data
ex_branch_taken / ex_branch_target -> u_pc.pc_sel_i, branch_target_i + flush_ifid / flush_idex
wb_rd_data / wb_rd / wb_reg_we -> Register File write port (we_i, rd_addr_i, rd_data_i) + WB->ID bypass + Forwarding Unit
